failures.hint: Add a maxRetries counter, exponential backoff, or circuit breaker pattern.

failures.title: Side-Effect: Unbounded Recursion
failures.details: Recursive function '_x' performs I/O but has no depth bound or base case before the recursive call. Unbounded recursion with I/O will exhaust resources (stack, file handles, network connections).
failures.hint: Add a depth/maxDepth parameter: _x(depth = 0) and return when depth exceeds the limit.

This workspace cannot use the npm package named `rigour` directly because it exposes no bin entry, so `npx rigour init` fails under npm 11. Keep package.json, tools/rigour-cli/, and rigour.yml in place if Rigour tools are needed.

Keep package.json, tools/rigour-cli/, and rigour.yml in place if Rigour tools are needed.
